events.title: Open Source, After Mythos - IBM Newsroom
events.content:
AI is crossing that threshold now.

Anthropic's limited preview of Claude Mythos brings that reality into sharper focus. The company says the model can discover and exploit software vulnerabilities at a level that few human experts can match, and it has launched a gated initiative, Project Glasswing, to put those capabilities into defenders' hands first.
